Array: Fine greatHorn Of Stability And  Strength Sash

During the Golden Ages, a celestial Artifact 
was crafted, which was then used to energize
the generator found in the subterranean city
and its artificial suns.  

This Artifact has become a highly sought-after 
resource among the elite dark creatures, as it 
serves as a powerful source of energy.

A treasured relic of ages past, a golden skull 
adorned with gem-encrusted eyes, was a 
valuable asset prior to the emergence of the 
Dark Void.

The celestial Artifact could be tapped as an 
energy source to bolster the fortifications
that safeguard human colonies.

Quinlan is the captain of the Diamond Order, 
serving as a ruthless and powerful right-hand 
to Onyx. His penchant for inflicting pain on 
captives is well-known, as are his formidable 
lightning spell attacks. His reputation for 
cruelty has earned him a place of terror in 
the hearts of many, with the thought of 
being captured by him prompting an even 
darker dread.

The moon-shaped pendant etched with the 
words 'Love you always, Mother Anya' seemed
to be a reminder of happier times, a faint 
glimmer of hope in an otherwise dismal and 
foreboding world.

To Amoux,

The pale light of the moon casts a somber hue 
on my thoughts, a melancholy reminder of our 
time together. I can almost feel your warmth 
beside me, the way our eyes linger on each 
other's faces. 

Every moment that passes adds to the longing 
for our reunion, a desire that can never
be fulfilled. Yours, Alice.

The ancient rune stones spoke of a dire 
warning, a prophecy of destruction that had 
been carved into the rock untold ages ago. 
Even after centuries of time, the meaning of
the symbols was still unclear - V, III, I, IV, II. 
What could it mean? Nothing good, it seemed, 
as the runes seemed to foretell a bleak future.

The ancient runes on the stone seemed to 
carry a somber message,  their carvings
foreboding and ominous. Translated, the 
numbers read III, I, V, IV, II,

The ancient rune stone, carved with symbols 
that could only be interpreted as  I, III, II, IV, V,

The artisan blacksmith could breathe new 
life into Apache's weapon parts by reforging
them into a different weapon.

An artisan blacksmith could take Quinlan's 
weapons parts and reforge them into a new 
and unique weapon.

Ankh, a technology of eons past hailing from
the Celestials, grants its users extraordinary
abilities. Though it has been forgotten for 
many years, only a select few alchemists
are able to activate its power.

The mysterious cargo was carefully
transported by the elite squad of the 
Knights of the Diamond Order. Its surface
had taken on a strange, organic form,
resembling the dark hide of some
unknown beast...

Place the mysterious sacrificial vessel at the 
skull-shaped statue to initiate the
ceremonial rite.

The keycard to Lab 12 was a symbol of the 
tragedy that had befallen Alpha Team. They
had been lost in contact, never to be seen or 
heard  from again, leaving the keycard as a 
reminder of the dark consequences 
of the experiment.

The key card was our only hope of escaping, 
but it was too late. Alpha team had been 
ambushed and all contact had been lost,
their last known whereabouts the 
South East Lab 12. We were doomed.

The key to unlock the mysterious door of the
Blood Wolf Captain was unlike any other.
As if it were forged in the ancient fires of the 
underworld, it seemed to weigh heavily in the
palm of anyone brave enough to possess it.
Its mere presence invoked a sense of dread, 
as if some dark force lurked within the depths
of the room it was meant to open.

The key to Knight Captain's room was an
elusive item, like the answer to a hidden 
riddle. It seemed almost impossible to find,
as if it were a secret buried in the shadows
of the past. Even though the key was so far
out of reach, there was a certain melancholic
allure that kept me searching.

Delta Corp's ARX-300 ion rifle was an early prototype developed 
by the company. Unfortunately, during the outbreak, many of these
weapons were stolen.

The Redon 55A Dark Hunter Pistol is renowned for its dependability, 
with its automag system ensuring reliable performance.

The MXRAID 2000 stands out for its impressive automatic function, 
lightning-fast firing rates, and effective performance over short to 
medium distances.

The Celestials created this tool for the purpose of constructing the city below 
the surface. Humans later redesigned it, transforming it into a prototype weapon. 
To fire, simply press and hold the attack button.

This ancient weapon, a relic of a Golden Age, can emit a scorching fireball 
that detonates upon impact and leaves a blazing trail of fire behind.

The legendary Dark hunter, Sagar Das, is in possession of a one-of-a-kind 
Revolver, capable of firing explosive rounds - making it an effective tool 
for taking down a swarm of foes.

PR-417 is a full-automatic plasma rifle designed to fire high-velocity plasma 
particles. Although the accuracy of this weapon is lacking, it has been
 adopted by special forces during initial engagements.

PAR08, developed during the historic "First Contact" event, was first 
used by the military in standard rifles and pistols.

SRA Special Ammo, more commonlyreferred to as “Kasper” Ammo, 
is a standard for Rapid-fire rifles, energy rifles and high-powered revolvers.

The HVA50 cartridge is a versatile addition to anti-material weapons, with its 
multiple generations of armour-piercing, incendiary, and special elemental-
based variants. This makes it an optimal choice for a variety of applications.

The versatile Blue Sorrow crafted from ion steel is renowned among 
mercenaries and bandits alike for its affordability and strength. 
Mastering its use, however, is no easy feat.

"Frrresssh meat!" Created by celestial beings in the late golden age, 
Cybermon is a nuclear-powered machine hammer.

Tachi, a swift and lightweight short sword, is commonly associated with
assassins due to its speed and energy efficiency, despite its limited range.

Shinda Kaminari, the renowned Dark Hunter, is said to be possessed by the 
Dark Void. It is also purported that he wields two powerful machine blades. 
Unleash a powerful strike by holding down the attack button.

The elite soldier's machine blade appears to have been imbued with the
power of the host from the secret chamber. Unleash a powerful strike by 
holding down the attack button.

The Summoner, a class of dark creatures with the power to manipulate other 
dimensions and teleport entities from one place to another, wields this weapon. 
Unleash a powerful attack by pressing and holding the Attack button.

The grenade unleashes a powerful lightning bolt
that inflicts maximum damage on its robotic foes.

The incendiary grenade unleashes a powerful chemical reaction 
capable of burning anything within its expansive radius, making 
it an invaluable tool against invisible creatures.

Humanity may not have survived for long without the
protection provided by the Buddy-XTR sentry gun.

Wielding the mighty Colossal Great Sword requires inhuman strength. 
Unleash its berserk power with a furious combination of rapid slashes 
by pressing and holding the attack button.

The Blood Wolf Captain "Apache" wields an enchanted gun sword set,
infused with Celestial artifacts. Unleash a teleport attack by holding
the attack button.

The Stone of Raven was once in the
possession of one of the four Celestial
Guardians, Cizin, the God of Death. They 
had fought valiantly against the Dark Void
during the first wave, emerging victorious -
albeit only briefly. Eventually, the Guardians
were corrupted by the Void and their royal
guards perished, only to rise again as 
Champions of Death, forever guarding
the Stone of Raven.

The Stone of Blood, belonging to the 
malevolent god of war Buluc, is a precious
and cursed relic, protected by the undead
champions of war. Its mystical weapon, 
The Impaler, is a symbol of the corruption 
that has taken root. No one dares to 
challenge its might.

No one can get close to the Stone of Arcane, 
for it is closely guarded by the Undead 
Champions of Arcane, remnants of a bygone 
age of sorcery and power. It is said that the
God of Sorcery, Ahau, bestowed the secrets of 
Lightning Sorcery upon the Diamond Knights 
during the Golden Age, and that the Stone of 
Arcane has been lost to mankind ever since.

The Stone of Resurrection, so desired by The 
Diamond God Helman, is guarded by 
unspeakable creatures of the dark. Those
foolish enough to worship Helman will pay the
ultimate price for attempting to resurrect the
dead - a price too cruel for any mortal being.

Amoux's Broken blade could be reforged by a 
skilled blacksmith into a new weapon of their 
own design.

An artisan blacksmith could skillfully reforge 
Onyx's broken  blade into a new weapon.

The plan was simple: to twist the fabric of 
human and Celestial DNA, forging a new breed 
of being, an unstoppable force of power and 
destruction - the Dark Hunters. Our creation 
would be continuously upgraded, modified, 
and strengthened until it was powerful enough 
to stand in the breach against the Dark 
Creatures and seal the Dark Void. We had no 
idea the cost of our ambition, nor the pain it
would bring.

The Levin 3900x drone, in conjunction with membership in the Knight of
the Diamond Order, grants access to the lightning-based skill tree. As a
drone bestowed upon the Knights by celestial beings, the Levin 3900x
is highly effective at dealing damage to multiple enemies simultaneously
and is especially effective against machine-like creatures

Elite soldiers may access the Stun skill via the Spike 900x drone,
which is standard equipment for such personnel. The Stun drone
is capable of  temporarily stunning nearby enemies, making it an 
invaluable tool in combat situations.

The RD 4800 drone enables access to the Missile skill, thanks to its
ability to fire powerful missiles in all directions. This drone is particularly
useful for engaging airborne enemies and maintaining crowd control.

The Crimson 5600B drone, available exclusively to members of The
House of Blood Wolves, unlocks the Blood skill tree. These unique 
drones are divine gifts from the Wolf god, and their Blood skills
cater to specialized combat preferences, whether melee or ranged.

An energy source found in dark creatures. Consume
the orb will restores small portion of health

An energy source found in dark creatures. Consume
the orb will refill your Drone Fuel Sphere

Upon defeating the corrupt sentinel, a Rejuvenate Core can be obtained,
and another may be acquired by scouring the City of Flesh. This invaluable
item is a reusable healing flask, enabling its user to recover lost health as 
needed. To replenish its restorative properties, one must rest at a portal, 
where the core can be recharged for future use.

The infusion of additional gems into the weapon
amplifies its elemental power, with the addition
of three fire gems, in particular, resulting in
increased fire damage. This damage is
compounded against invisible creatures,
and has a damaging effect over time.

The infusion of additional gems amplifies the
elemental effect, with a trio of gems having
the potential to freeze enemies. The Ice Gem
is particularly effective against elite dark 
creatures, temporarily incapacitating them.

The more gems infused into a weapon,
the greater its elemental potency. Infusing
three gems carries the potential to generate
a lightning chain, making it especially 
effective against mechanized foes.

The infusion of additional gems amplifies the 
elemental effect, allowing the weapon to
 generate a poisonous mist when three gems 
are present. This mist is particularly effective 
against large groups and those with armour.
They are often founded on mutated dark creatures.
Medium health shards are rare to find
Large health shards are very rare to find.
They are often derived from mutated dark creatures.
Medium energy shards are often derived from mutated dark creatures and can be difficult to come across.
Large energy shards are very rare to find.
Fragments of the mineral Trinitite, used by Celestials to construct the terraforming generator and the city beneath, are known as Trinitite Shards.
Fragments of the Large Trinitite chunk, Celestials used energy mineral called "Trinitite" to build the terraform generator and the city below.
Can be used for upgrading Weapons

Unlocks the entrance to the mysterious sewers, 
where valuable upgrading materials can be found.

With the Sonic Core in hand, the power of the Dash skill is yours
to command. Defeating the Butcher has granted you this ability, 
allowing you to charge forward and deal minor damage while 
knocking down humanoid enemies. Use it to traverse dangerous
terrain, leaping across gaps and scaling steep cliffs with ease

Upon defeating the corrupt sentinel, a Rejuvenate Core can be obtained,
and another may be acquired by scouring the City of Flesh. This invaluable
item is a reusable healing flask, enabling its user to recover lost health as 
needed. To replenish its restorative properties, one must rest at a portal, 
where the core can be recharged for future use.

Unlocks a shortcut to the Zion Gateway, 
allowing for swift passage.

Opens the portal to the sacred Celestial Burial Grounds. 
Two keys are required, including the Key of Crimson 
and the Key of Sage.

Opens the portal to the sacred Celestial Burial Grounds. 
Two keys are required, including the Key of Crimson 
and the Key of Sage.

Unlocks the chamber of the esteemed 
Knight Captain Quinlan.

Grants access to the Wolf Captain's quarters, 
providing a convenient shortcut.

A dual plasma blade imbued with celestial technology and reserved only for 
elite warriors. Hold the attack button to unleash a powerful dash attack and 
claim victory on the battlefield.

Unlocks the entrance to the mysterious 
sewers, where valuable upgrading
materials can be found.

Unlocks a shortcut to the Zion Gateway, 
allowing for swift passage.

Opens the portal to the sacred Celestial 
Burial Grounds. Two keys are required,
including the Key of Crimson
and the Key of Sage.

Opens the portal to the sacred Celestial 
Burial Grounds. Two keys are required,
including the Key of Crimson
and the Key of Sage.

In the realm of mysterious artifacts,
the Absolution Seed reigns supreme.
Its metallic surface exudes an eerie 
and constant warmth, and possesses
the power to reset a player's attributes.
